title: WEALTH Canonical MCP Tool Schema
description: 13-tool canonical WEALTH MCP surface with legacy aliases merged into mode-bearing sovereign primitives.

envelope_id.description: W@W envelope binding this tool call to upstream authorities

vault_log_entry.description: Append-only VAULT999 fragment for this call

wealth_future_value.description: Time-Discounted Projection Engine — NPV, IRR, PI, Payback. [Value Dimension]

wealth_future_simulate.description: Stochastic Projection Engine (Future) — Monte Carlo. [Simulate Dimension]

wealth_survival_liquidity.description: Survival Liquidity — Cashflow, Runway, Triage. [Liquidity Dimension]

wealth_survival_leverage.description: Structural Load — DSCR + Balance Sheet. [Leverage Dimension]

wealth_info_value.description: Expected Value of Information — EVOI point-estimate and Monte Carlo. [Info Dimension]

wealth_truth_validate.description: Epistemic Integrity — Schema, Correlation, Entropy. [Truth Dimension]

wealth_rule_enforce.description: Governance Constraint — F1-F13 Floors, Policy Audit. [Rule Dimension]

wealth_allocate_optimize.description: Capital Allocation Brain — Kernel, Personal, Agent. [Allocate Dimension]

wealth_game_coordinate.description: Multi-Agent Dynamics — Equilibrium, Game Theory. [Game Dimension]

wealth_sense_ingest.description: Reality Intake — Fetch, Snapshot, Sources, Health, Vintage, Reconcile. [Sense Dimension]

wealth_past_record.description: Vault + Merkle Anchoring (Past) — Vault Init, Record, Snapshot. [Record Dimension]

wealth_future_steward.description: Long-Horizon Planetary Boundaries — Civilization Continuity. [Steward Dimension]
